title: Opening apps
drDigitalIntro:
To open an app, click its icon in the dock.
• If it's not in the dock, search your computer's files for it.
• Let's practice: open all four apps in the dock.

playgroundTask.instructions: Click each icon in the dock to open all four apps

drDigitalSuccess: That's how you open apps — click and go! You opened every one.
drDigitalHint: Click an icon at the bottom of the desktop to open that app, then close it with the red X and open the next one, until you've opened all four.
